scenes.name: Land on app
scenes.note: Let the viewer take in the split layout: title bar, template gallery, markdown editor, and live preview.

scenes.name: Focus deck title
scenes.note: Click into the deck title field to start the primary workflow.

scenes.name: Notice title field ready
scenes.note: Notice the title input is active and ready for a custom deck name.

scenes.name: Name the deck
scenes.note: Give the deck a clear product-style title using a household product name.

scenes.name: Notice title update
scenes.note: Notice the top bar now reflects the new deck title.

scenes.name: Focus markdown editor
scenes.selector:

- bullet
- bullet"]
scenes.note: Move into the markdown composer where the deck content is authored.

scenes.name: Notice editor caret
scenes.note: Notice the editor is active and the seeded content is ready to be replaced.

scenes.name: Replace markdown with product deck
scenes.selector:
textarea[placeholder="# Slide 1 title
Body here…

---

# Slide 2 title
- bullet
- bullet"]
scenes.text:
# ClawDash
Turn raw work into a polished portable deck.

---

## Why teams use it
- Write in markdown
- Preview slides live
- Export one self-contained HTML file

---

## Style presets
Choose from 13 household presentation styles for dark, light, and specialty looks.

---

## Workflow
Draft on the left.
Review on the right.
Ship anywhere offline.

---

## Best for
Product updates
Internal briefings
Founder storytelling

---

# Ready to share
Download the deck as a single HTML file.
scenes.note: Paste a concise 6-slide story so the live preview updates into a clear product narrative.

scenes.name: Notice live preview refresh
scenes.note: Notice the preview has re-rendered from the markdown automatically, showing the first slide of the new deck.

scenes.name: Choose a contrasting template
scenes.note: Switch from the current light Simployer style to the Neon Cyber template to show how themes change instantly.

scenes.name: Notice visual restyle
scenes.note: Notice the same content now appears with a dramatically different visual treatment, proving style presets are decoupled from content.

scenes.name: Show preview area
scenes.note: Settle the viewport on the editor and preview panels so the transformation is easy to compare.
